briefdescription.para: Minimum byte alignment requirement for descriptors to satisfy both hardware/software needs.

description.para: This register reports status of a DMA channel, including idle state, errors, and interrupts
These masks are shared by XAXICDMA_CR_OFFSET register and XAXICDMA_SR_OFFSET register

briefdescription.para: All interrupts for simple only mode.

sectiondef.header: Bitmask and shift for delay counter and coalescing counter

description.para: These masks are shared by XAXICDMA_CR_OFFSET register and XAXICDMA_SR_OFFSET register
The first 8 words are used by hardware.
Cache operations are required for words used by hardware to enforce data consistency. All words after the 8th word are for software use only.

briefdescription.para: BD specific bytes to be cleared.
Total number of words for one BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the base virtual address of the device
is the register offset to be read

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XAxiCdma_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: is the base virtual address of the device
is the register offset to be written
is the 32-bit value to write to the register

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XAxiCdma_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)
